Fagus sylvatica, commonly known as the Beech, is a deciduous tree native to Europe and Western Asia. The health benefits of Fagus sylvatica are largely anecdotal, but it is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, potentially aiding in the treatment of various ailments such as arthritis and respiratory issues.
